title: GooseBornium
description: A mod i made for me and my friend! It includes a lot of lore for our characters and some funny references to other media. Hope You enjoy!
body:
# **Features**
- Unique ore, weapons, tools and armour
  
![spiron and fishium](https://i.imgur.com/yvEWgQw.png)

- Mobs

![mobs](https://i.imgur.com/RsRPn0R.jpeg)

- Structures

  ![structures](https://i.imgur.com/E4EjnxK.jpeg)

- Biomes

![biomes](https://i.imgur.com/JU43VUs.jpeg)

- And so much more!

![items](https://i.imgur.com/DVMVLaK.png)

Note: Natures compass, explorers compass and JEI/REI highly recomended

# **Progression**

**Goose's route (Good for casual players):**

1. Get fishium from fish
2. make fishium gear (equivilent to iron)
3. make advanced fishium
4. get fishium upgrade templates from desert wagons
5. defeat Pureform's first (found in graveyard structure)
6. upgrade fishium armour to Goose's armour (equivilent to netherite)
7. make Goose's dagger
8. defeat Retanis (found in Reborn's d**th chamber structure)
9. (complete GooseBorn steps)

**Reborn's route (similar to regular progression):**

1. get spiron dust from crystal biome caves
2. craft into spiron
3. make spiron gear (equivilent to diamond, sword same as iron)
4. defeat Pureform's first (found in graveyard structure)
5. craft Pureform essence
6. make Pureform destroyer
7. defeat Retanis (found in Reborn's d**th chamber structure)
8. upgrade spiron armour to Reborn's armour (templates found from killing Retanis)
9. (complete GooseBorn steps)

**GooseBorn route (beyond regular progression):**
1. craft both Reborn's armour and Goose's armour
2. defeat GooseBorn
3. combine both armour sets together (templates found from killing GooseBorn)
4. (new progression soon)
